title: Standard 7 Students Begin Revision Programme.
excerpt: Our Standard 7 pupils have commenced their intensive national examination revision programme. Teachers are working closely with students to ensure thorough preparation for the PSLE examinations.

title: New Classroom Block Construction Underway
excerpt: Thanks to generous donations from supporters around the world, construction of a new two-classroom block at Samunge HQ has officially begun. The new block will ease overcrowding and accommodate more students.

title: Annual Sports Day Brings Joy to Samunge
excerpt: Students from all three Butemine centres gathered at Samunge HQ for the annual Sports Day. Events included running races, tug-of-war, and traditional Batemi cultural dances. A wonderful day of community spirit.

title: End of Year Celebration & Prize Giving
excerpt: Butemine Primary School held its annual end-of-year prize giving ceremony. Top performing students across all classes were recognised and awarded. Parents and community members joined in the celebrations.

title: International Volunteer Teachers Arrive
excerpt: We warmly welcomed two international volunteer teachers from Europe who joined our staff for the school term. Their contribution to English language instruction and science lessons has been invaluable.

title: Orphan Support Fund Reaches 30 Beneficiaries
excerpt: The Butemine Orphan Support Fund now covers 30 students who would otherwise be unable to attend school. These children receive full fee waiver, school materials, and a daily meal. Your donations make this possible.
